allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''D:\\Coding\\OpenClaw_Indiviual_SOUL.md\\'' -File | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -File - <<'PS1'
$base = 'D:\\Coding\\OpenClaw_Indiviual_SOUL.md'
$names = 'SOUL.md','IDENTITY.md','HEARTBEAT_SEGMENT.md'
foreach \($n in $names\) {
    $rp = Join-Path $base $n
    $sp = Join-Path $base "src\\$n"
    $rHash = \(Get-FileHash $rp\).Hash
    $sHash = \(Get-FileHash $sp\).Hash
    $rDate = \(Get-Item $rp\).LastWriteTime.ToString\('yyyy-MM-dd'\)
    $sDate = \(Get-Item $sp\).LastWriteTime.ToString\('yyyy-MM-dd'\)
    $rLen = \(Get-Item $rp\).Length
    $sLen = \(Get-Item $sp\).Length
    $status = if \($rHash -eq $sHash\) { 'IDENTICAL' } else { 'DIFFERENT' }
    Write-Host "$n : $status | root=${rLen}B \($rDate\) | src=${sLen}B \($sDate\)"
}
PS1)

Bash(git -C "D:\\Coding\\OpenClaw_Indiviual_SOUL.md" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
MVP Phase 1 complete \(R35\) + GTM prep

Code changes \(R18b -> R35\):
- SKILL.md: #22/#23 FORBIDDEN+STRICT rules, #24 INIT protection,
  #25 memory.md append-only, #26 reset completeness, #20 mitigation
- handler.js: context.md safeWriteFile, HEARTBEAT/SOUL repair
- Install script: .soul_history/ step, SOURCE path fix

Phase 1 收尾 \(GTM prep\):
- Archive: MVP snapshot \(14 files\), test detail R1-R18d
- Test Feedback slimmed from ~689 to 77 lines
- CLAUDE.md: added Current Status, Pitfall Reference, Doc Nav, Milestones
- Business Plan: aligned to v3.1 architecture \(Sections 2.3/5.1/5.2/5.5/12.3\)
- Customer install script \(generic paths, -WhatIf, backup, rollback guide\)
- Customer package \(10 files\) + README + feedback template
- Cleaned up root-level legacy files into docs/archive/

Validation: R35 V-1~V-3 all passed, 17 CLOSED / 1 ACCEPTED / 1 ONGOING

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
